data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Deposit hold/capture integration' but did not provide any evidence confirming its implementation or functionality. The linked use case explicitly states this need, yet the prior steps do not address or validate this aspect, indicating a clear gap in coverage. Without evidence of the deposit hold/capture integration being satisfied, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: Deposit hold/capture integration is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
